  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get ProcurementAgent by display name"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/procurementAgent/getDisplayName/realmId/{realmId}/name/{name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



API used to get the ProcurementAgent by providing the display name of the ProcurementAgent and the Realm

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"name":"realmId","in":"path","description":"RealmId that you want to the ProcurementAgent for","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},{"name":"name","in":"path","description":"Display name that you want to the ProcurementAgent for","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
